titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale University Women's Organization Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 14, 2020 at 09:57

did.abstract: The records consist of minutes, including minutes of the Newcomer's Club, newsletters, annual reports, program records, correspondence, and printed materials documenting the activities of the Yale University Women's Organization.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 40 (YRG 40), Records of Yale clubs, societies, and organizations.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

Original born digital files, as well as preservation masters, may not be accessed due to their fragility. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist request that they be made. Born digital files cannot be accessed remotely. System requirements include a Manuscripts and Archives computer and file viewing software.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale University Women's Organization Records (RU 70). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Yale University Women's Organization was established in 1965. The organization is open to women members of the Yale community, including faculty, staff, wives of faculty and staff, and other women affiliated with the university. Its main activities include educational lectures, social activities, and a scholarship program.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of minutes, including minutes of the Newcomer's Club, newsletters, annual reports, program records, correspondence, and printed materials documenting the activities of the Yale University Women's Organization.

did.unittitle: Records documenting the creation of spousal identification cards
Constitution and by-laws, review rules of president and vice-president
Constitutional review ground rules and background information
State of Connecticut sales tax exemption
Job descriptions for officers and board members
YUWO'a first year and early history
Faculty Clubs of MIT and Harvard
Board meeting agenda and minutes, financial statements

unittitle.emph: A Guide for New Members of the Faculty and Their Wives

did.unittitle: Information and Counseling Service for Women
Luncheon at Marty Sherman's for old and new board
Luncheon with Tom Duffy, Music School Associate Dean

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Disk image contains 20 .jpeg files of photographs from a YUWO holiday party. Disk label text identifies the year of the party as 2005. Location is unknown. Nametags of participants can be seen in some images. File creation dates were determined though the file properties.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This material was imaged by Manuscripts and Archives staff in 2013 using FTK Imager, for preservation and access. Additional information about actions taken may be available at the repository.

did.unittitle: YUWO photo archive part I (computer files)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 15 .pct image files of photographs, news clippings and clip art from YUWO activities, events and presentations. Also includes data on scholarship allocation. Estimated dates of image files are from 1972 to 2001 based on the content of the files. File creation dates were determined though the file properties.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This material imaged with significant errors by Manuscripts and Archives staff in 2013, using FTK Imager for preservation and access. Readable files extracted from disk image using ISO Buster in 2020. Additional information about actions taken may be available at the repository.

did.unittitle: YUWO photo archive part II (computer files)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 22 .pct image files of photographs of Yale campus building interiors and exteriors, and YUWO activities and events. Also included are news clippings of guest speakers including Betty Friedan and Kitty Carlisle as well as scanned images of YUWO promotional calendars, brochures and newsletters. Estimated dates of image files are from 1967 to 1990 based on the content of the files. File creation dates were determined though the file properties.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This material was imaged by Manuscripts and Archives staff in 2013 using FTK Imager, for preservation and access. Additional information about actions taken may be available at the repository.

did.unittitle: In Celebration of the Life of Margaret "Magee" Fenn, First Congregational Church, Branford, CT
Minutes, membership lists, reports, fliers, speaker's c.v., activities, clippings
